title: ctenopteris hayatae
intro: Ctenopteris hayatae, also known as hayata's fern or Ctenopteris, is a species of fern native to Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenopteris hayatae include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can lead to chronic diseases. In traditional herbal preparations, Ctenopteris hayatae is often used as a tea or infusion, or in combination with other herbs to create tonics and supplements.
